items.hook: Sack of Aquileia: After an earlier defeat on the Catalaunian Plains, Attila lays siege to the metropolis of Aquileia and eventually destroys it.
items.body: The Sack of Aquileia occurred in 452, and was carried out by the Huns under the leadership of Attila. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Storms provoke severe flooding on the Saguenay River, beginning one of Quebec's costliest natural disasters ever.
items.body: The Saguenay flood was a series of flash floods on July 19 and 20, 1996 that hit the Saguenay–Lac-Saint-Jean region of Quebec, Canada. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: ‘Maybe the best pumped-up sequel ever made’: James Cameron’s Aliens hits 40
items.body:
The director’s more-is-more approach to the 1986 sequel gave us seat-edge action and an indelible performance from a rule-breaking Sigourney Weaver

items.hook: Hagitude author Sharon Blackie: ‘At 60 I wasn’t ready to give up, I was just starting’
items.body:
The writer of cult hit If Women Rose Rooted is on a mission to bring folklore to modern readers. She talks about confronting her fears, communing with nature – and the power that comes with age

Like many of the wise women in her bo

items.hook: Why the upcoming eclipse is still vital in the age of solar probes
items.body: Experiments will take advantage of the solar eclipse in August to learn more about the sun and Earth at a relatively low cost

items.hook: South Asian University (SAU) is an international university sponsored by the eight Member States of the South Asian Association for Regional Cooperation (SAARC).
items.body: The eight countries are Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Bhutan, India, Maldives, Nepal, Pakistan, and Sri Lanka. One of those things you can't un-know.
Adolf Hitler was an Austrian-born German politician who was dictator of Germany in the Nazi era from 1933 until his suicide in 1945. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Upperby is a former village, now a suburb of Carlisle, in the Cumberland district, in the English county of Cumbria.
items.body: The ward population taken at the 2011 census was 5,476. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: The bishop of Florence blesses the first foundation stone for the new campanile (bell tower) of the Florence Cathedral, designed by the artist Giotto di Bondone.
items.body: Florence is the capital and most populous city of the Italian region of Tuscany, with 361,625 inhabitants as of 2026. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Edward Ravenscroft was an English dramatist who belonged to an ancient Flintshire family.
items.body: He was entered at the Middle Temple, but devoted his attention mainly to literature. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Signed Hockney print found in a book sells for £41K
items.body: The print, found in a book donated to a Salvation Army shop, is snapped up by an anonymous bidder.

items.hook: Battle of Alarcos: Almohad forces defeat the Castilian army of Alfonso VIII and force its retreat to Toledo.
items.body: Battle of Alarcos, was fought between the Almohads led by Abu Yusuf Ya'qub al-Mansur and King Alfonso VIII of Castile. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: National Year of Reading should extend to a decade, inquiry says
items.body:
The education committee also proposed a National Reading Guarantee, ensuring all children have frequent opportunities to enjoy reading

items.hook: Human spaceflight: Gemini 10 is launched from Cape Kennedy on a 70-hour mission that includes docking with an orbiting Agena target vehicle.
items.body: Human spaceflight is spaceflight with a crew or passengers aboard a spacecraft, often with the spacecraft being operated directly by the onboard crew. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: The Arevaci or Aravaci, were a Celtic people who settled in the central Meseta of northern Hispania and dominated most of Celtiberia from the 4th to late 2nd centuries BC.
items.body: The Vaccaei were their allies. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Evangelical Baptist Convention is a Baptist Christian denomination in Manipur, India.
items.body: Their main area of presence is in the southern part of Manipur. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Chastity, nodding and enormous pores: will women also love Nolan’s Odyssey?
items.body:

items.hook: The Hunt for Gollum is being criticised for its all-white cast. Blaming Tolkien is the wrong answer
items.body:
The Lord of the Rings author’s debt to Norse mythology is simply irrelevant when it comes to the appearance of hobbits and elves on screen today

Casting has come a long way since the early 1980s when it was somehow still acceptable
